_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of erythrocyte p55/MPP1 as a binding partner of NF2 tumor suppressor protein/Merlin.

_contextSnippet: for non-myelin-forming Schwann cells (GFAP)...Merlin clearly colocalized with the S100 and GFAP markers...P55...colocalized with GFAP
details: Successfully used as marker for non-myelin-forming Schwann cells, showed colocalization with both merlin and p55
